tasks.title: Write the Express App Skeleton
tasks.prompt: From memory, write the Meridian Express app.ts skeleton showing the complete middleware pipeline in correct order. Include at least: Helmet, CORS, rateLimit, JSON body parser, authMiddleware, and errorHandler registration. Use TypeScript.
success_criteria: app.use(cors()) before rateLimit and JSON parser
app.use(errorHandler) is last — four parameter signature

tasks.title: Find the Tenant Middleware Bug
success_criteria: workspace_id from req.body — must be from req.params
SET not SET LOCAL — will cause workspace context to leak in connection pools
